aiBriefing.summary: After reading 30 Gmail threads and 7 Jira tickets (23 comments): your JFM QBR deck is due to Vivek Premnath by Wed/Thu (8-9 Apr) — this is the top deadline. Nidhi Shah flagged 4 open vendor billing disputes from your new payment process that need closure. Jaipur Fabric is a churn risk (SMS broken, no AM for 2 months). Only 1 Jira ticket needs you (pricing recovery plan, 24 days stale) — the other 6 you already approved. Tanmay shared a KwikShip feature priority list and Mrigank needs help with his goals.
highlights: 🔴 DEADLINE: QBR deck due to Vivek Premnath by Wed 8 Apr (Thu 9 Apr latest). Biz QBR rescheduled to 15 Apr, now Q&A-only — deck must be shared for async review.
🟡 VENDOR BILLING: Nidhi flagged 4 open disputes — RML WA variance, WA conversation diff, SMS/Goexcelsior invoices, Chatbot AI rate. Also need to name Tech SPOC and CSM SPOC.
🟡 CHURN RISK: Jaipur Fabric (Praveen Kaushik, CMO) — SMS campaigns broken, no account manager for 2 months. Explicitly threatening to leave.
🟡 KWIKSHIP: Tanmay shared feature priority list (address-to-latlong, NDR address change, shipper selection, EDD for KE). Review and confirm priorities.
🟡 JIRA: TO-66065 (pricing recovery) — Ruchika waiting 24 days for your input on recovery approach for 5 prepaid merchants.
🟡 GOALS: Mrigank needs your help finalizing his goals (Shiprocket integration, Custom API, KwikShip Jira sanitisation, NDR experiments, OMS, KwikPass custom merchants).
